Plot EP/WP game flow chart

Source: R/plot_game.R
plot_ep_wp.Rd

Visualizes the expected points or win probability trajectory of a single AFL match. The most common visualization in sports analytics.

Usage

plot_ep_wp(
  season = get_afl_season(),
  round = NULL,
  match_id = NULL,
  metric = c("wp", "ep"),
  show_plays = TRUE,
  home_color = NULL,
  away_color = NULL,
  data = NULL
)

Arguments

season

Season year (default: current season).

round

Round number. If NULL and match_id is NULL, uses latest round.

match_id

Optional specific match ID. If NULL, the round must contain exactly one match or an error is raised with available matches.

metric

One of "wp" (win probability, default) or "ep" (expected points).

show_plays

Logical. If TRUE (default), overlay key play markers (goals).

home_color

Override hex colour for home team.

away_color

Override hex colour for away team.

data

Optional pre-loaded EP/WP chart data. If NULL, loads via load_ep_wp_charts().

Value

A ggplot2 object.
